title: WAF Protocol Attack Blocked
description: Detects HTTP protocol violation attacks blocked by WAF (request smuggling, header injection, HTTP splitting). OWASP A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and ( (('Rule Key' like '*920*' or 'Rule Key' like '*921*')) or (('Request Headers' like '*%0d%0a*' or 'Request Headers' like '*%0D%0A*' or 'Request Headers' like '*Transfer-Encoding: chunked*' or 'Request Headers' like '*Content-Length: 0*')) ))
falsepositives: Legitimate HTTP clients with unusual header formatting
